codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix addresses the prior blocker by removing the unreachable duplicate `failing_final_review` guard and updating call sites/tests accordingly. Reviewing both diffs shows the original round-2 change (present-but-failing finalReview in VAL-CORRECT-031) is now aligned with runtime behavior because only the live general `failing_final_review` branch remains, and the mission contract text now explicitly documents that shared branch behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture documentation appears stale on completion-gate rule count after this refactor.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:75 says `validateSuccessfulCompletion` enforces 9 rules, but src/runtime/transitions/execution-completion-guards.ts now contains 8 checks (`kind:` entries at lines 59, 65, 71, 78, 84, 90, 97, 103).

summary: Reviewed fix feature m2-completion-gate-refactor against prior failure m2-scrutiny-fixes-round2 and both commit diffs (9f8b1a3 and e351b92). The previous isolation blocker is resolved by deleting dead runtime guard code; no correctness regressions were found in the reviewed scope.
